title: picris hispidissima
intro: Picris hispidissima, also known as the rough hawk's beard or hairy picris, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The root of the plant contains bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones, which have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, leading to potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Picris hispidissima can be made by infusing the plant material in hot water or oil, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
